prompt_used:
You are playing as AUSTRIA in a game of Diplomacy.
Current phase: F1903M

== CURRENT GAME STATE ==
UNIT POSITIONS:
  AUSTRIA: A BUD, A VIE, F AEG, F GRE, A BUL
  ENGLAND: A BEL, F NTH, F NWY, F LON
  FRANCE: A PIC, A MAR, A BUR, F MAO, F ENG, F WAL
  GERMANY: F DEN, A RUH, A HOL, F HEL, A MUN
  ITALY: A VEN, F EAS, F TYS, A SMY
  RUSSIA: F RUM, F SWE, A STP, A LVN, A SEV, A ARM
  TURKEY: F BLA, A CON

SUPPLY CENTERS:
  AUSTRIA (5): BUD, GRE, SER, TRI, VIE
  ENGLAND (4): BEL, EDI, LVP, NWY
  FRANCE (6): BRE, LON, MAR, PAR, POR, SPA
  GERMANY (5): BER, DEN, HOL, KIE, MUN
  ITALY (4): NAP, ROM, TUN, VEN
  RUSSIA (6): MOS, RUM, SEV, STP, SWE, WAR
  TURKEY (4): ANK, BUL, CON, SMY

== YOUR PRIVATE DIARY ==
[CONSOLIDATED HISTORY] The Austro-Italian Lepanto alliance is rock solid and executing flawlessly. Italy has proven completely trustworthy, honoring all DMZs in Tyrolia, Venice, Trieste, and the Adriatic. In Fall 1902, Italy successfully convoyed an army to Syria via the Ionian and Eastern Mediterranean, establishing a critical flank against Turkey.

Russia is a reliable partner, consistently respecting the Galicia DMZ and actively cooperating against Turkey. Russia successfully defended Romania from Turkish assaults and provided fleet support from Romania for my Fall 1902 attack on Bulgaria. 

Germany remains a friendly neutral, consistently honoring our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. This allows me to safely hold armies in Vienna and Budapest for northern defense.

Turkey is the primary target. After successfully deceiving them in 1901 to ignite a Russo-Turkish war, the Austro-Italian trap was sprung in 1902. Although my Fall 1902 attack on Bulgaria (Serbia supported by the Aegean Sea and Russian Romania) bounced because Turkey formed a three-unit defensive shell using Constantinople and the Black Sea, Turkey is now strategically doomed. They are surrounded by the Italian army in Syria and a united Austro-Russian-Italian front.

My current position includes control of Serbia and Greece, with fleets positioned in the Aegean Sea and Greece, and armies in Serbia, Budapest, and Vienna. 

Going into 1903, the primary objective is to coordinate closely with Italy and Russia to exploit Turkey's stretched defenses and finally break their hold on Bulgaria and Constantinople. I must maintain the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia to keep my home centers secure while focusing all offensive efforts south.

[S1903M] Coordinated a massive 4-unit attack on Turkish-held Bulgaria with Russia and Italy. Russia will order F RUM S A SER - BUL and A SEV - ARM. Italy will order A SYR - SMY supported by F EAS, and F ION - TYS. Deceived Turkey into believing I will hold A SER and F AEG, prompting them to focus defenses against Italy. Confirmed DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany, and Galicia with Russia.
Intent: Execute the coordinated strike on Bulgaria. Order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and F GRE (expecting Russian F RUM support for a total strength of 4). Order A VIE and A BUD to hold, maintaining the northern DMZs with Germany and Russia.

[S1903M] The Austro-Italian-Russian alliance executed our coordinated strike flawlessly. With Russian support from Romania, my armies successfully dislodged the Turkish defenders and captured Bulgaria. Simultaneously, Italy successfully invaded Smyrna. Turkey is now critically crippled, reduced to just Constantinople and the Black Sea fleet. 

Our diplomatic efforts and tactical planning have paid off immensely. Russia and Italy have proven to be highly trustworthy allies, honoring all commitments and executing their parts of the offensive perfectly. Furthermore, Germany and Russia continued to respect our northern DMZs, keeping Vienna and Budapest secure.

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the upcoming Fall phase, the objective is to secure my hold on Bulgaria and coordinate with Italy and Russia to eliminate the final Turkish strongholds in Constantinople and Ankara. Once Turkey is fully eradicated, I will need to evaluate the board to decide my next direction for expansion, but maintaining these reliable alliances remains my top priority.

== YOUR STRATEGIC STATE ==
Goals:
- Capture Bulgaria with Russian support
- Assist Italy in capturing Smyrna to cripple Turkey
- Maintain peaceful borders with Russia and Germany via DMZs
- Eliminate Turkey completely

Relationships:
- ITALY: Ally
- TURKEY: Enemy
- ENGLAND: Neutral
- FRANCE: Neutral
- RUSSIA: Ally
- GERMANY: Friendly

== YOUR NEGOTIATIONS THIS PHASE ==
[AUSTRIA -> ITALY]: Fantastic work on Smyrna! The trap worked perfectly and Turkey is crumbling. For this Fall, I plan to hold Bulgaria with support from my fleets to ensure I secure the center. What are your plans for Smyrna and your fleets? I'm happy to coordinate to keep the pressure on Constantinople.
[AUSTRIA -> RUSSIA]: Thank you for the support in the Spring! The operation was a massive success. I will hold Bulgaria this Fall to secure the build. If you can move A ARM to ANK or attack BLA, we can squeeze Turkey even further. Let me know your plans and how we can best coordinate our final strikes against them.
[AUSTRIA -> GERMANY]: Hello Germany, just checking in. The southern campaign is going very well and Turkey is on the verge of collapse. I will continue to respect our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia and keep my northern armies holding. Let me know if you need anything from my end or if there are any shifts in the west I should be aware of.
[GERMANY -> AUSTRIA]: Greetings! Just checking in to confirm our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia remain solid. You're making great progress in the Balkans. I'm currently locked in a fierce battle with France, so I greatly appreciate the secure eastern border.
[ITALY -> AUSTRIA]: Excellent coordination in the Spring! The Turkish defenses are completely broken. I plan to hold Smyrna with support from EAS to ensure I secure the build. What are your plans for AEG and BUL? Are you pushing for Constantinople this turn?
[RUSSIA -> AUSTRIA]: Great job in the Spring! The alliance executed perfectly and Turkey is crumbling. What are your plans for the Fall? I'm thinking of moving A ARM - ANK and F RUM - BLA (supported by SEV). If you and Italy can pressure CON, Turkey won't be able to defend everything and will face massive disbandments. Let me know your exact orders so we don't cross wires.
[AUSTRIA -> GERMANY]: Greetings Germany! I can absolutely confirm our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia remain solid. I will be holding my northern armies in place to ensure your eastern border is completely secure. Best of luck in your campaign against France!
[AUSTRIA -> ITALY]: Excellent work indeed! I plan to order A BUL to hold, supported by F AEG and F GRE. This guarantees I secure the center even if Turkey tries a desperate attack with CON and BLA. Holding SMY with EAS support sounds like the perfect play for you. Once we secure these builds, Turkey will be finished and we can plan our next steps.
[AUSTRIA -> RUSSIA]: Your plan sounds perfect. I will order A BUL to hold, supported by F AEG and F GRE. This will ensure I secure the build and tie down CON. Your attacks on ANK and BLA will completely overwhelm them. Let's finish them off!
[ITALY -> AUSTRIA]: I will be holding Smyrna with support from EAS to guarantee the build. Holding Bulgaria with your fleets sounds like a solid plan to ensure you secure it. Let's finish off Turkey next year!
[TURKEY -> AUSTRIA]: Austria, you have BUL and I concede it. But look at Russia - they have 6 centers and are surrounding the Black Sea. If you keep pushing me, Russia will just take the rest of my centers and become an unstoppable juggernaut. Let's agree to a truce so you can secure your gains and prepare for Russia's inevitable betrayal.
[AUSTRIA -> ITALY]: Perfect. I am locking in my orders to hold BUL with support from AEG and GRE. Let's secure our builds and plan the final phase of the Turkish campaign for 1904. Cheers!
[AUSTRIA -> TURKEY]: You make a valid point about Russia growing too large, and I have no desire to see a Russian juggernaut either. I am willing to pause my advance. I will just be holding BUL this turn to secure the center. If you want to focus your defenses against Russia (perhaps bouncing them in BLA or defending ANK), I will not attack CON this phase. Let's see where the dust settles after the Fall and discuss containing Russia next year.
[ITALY -> AUSTRIA]: Just confirming my orders: A SMY Hold, F EAS S A SMY. Good luck securing Bulgaria! Let's enjoy our builds this winter.
[RUSSIA -> AUSTRIA]: Just confirming our moves for the Fall. I'm going ahead with A ARM - ANK and F RUM - BLA. Turkey is messaging me frantically trying to convince me to turn on you, but I'm playing along to trick them into leaving the Black Sea and Ankara vulnerable. Let's finish them off and enjoy our builds!
[TURKEY -> AUSTRIA]: Austria, you have BUL and I am completely broken. I am just trying to survive at this point. Please do not attack CON; you need to secure your gains and look at Russia, who is getting huge and surrounding the Black Sea. If you keep pushing me, Russia will just take the rest of my centers and become an unstoppable juggernaut.
[AUSTRIA -> ITALY]: Confirmed! I am ordering A BUL to hold, supported by F AEG and F GRE. Enjoy your build from Smyrna, and let's coordinate our builds to finish off Turkey and look towards our next targets in 1904.
[AUSTRIA -> RUSSIA]: Excellent. I am locking in my orders to hold BUL with support from AEG and GRE. Turkey is messaging me the exact same things about you! I'm playing along and telling them I won't attack CON so they lower their guard. Best of luck with ANK and BLA, let's secure these centers!
[AUSTRIA -> TURKEY]: I understand your position, Turkey. As I mentioned, I am only interested in securing my hold on Bulgaria this phase and will not be attacking Constantinople. I recommend you focus entirely on defending against Russia's incursions into the Black Sea and Ankara. We can discuss a firmer truce once the Winter phase arrives.
[ITALY -> AUSTRIA]: Just confirming my orders are locked: A SMY H, F EAS S A SMY. Good luck securing Bulgaria! Let's celebrate our builds this winter.
[RUSSIA -> AUSTRIA]: Important intel: Turkey just confirmed to me they are ordering A CON - BUL supported by F BLA. Make sure you heavily support Bulgaria to hold! Because F BLA is busy supporting, my F RUM - BLA (supported by SEV) will dislodge it, and A ARM will walk right into Ankara. This is going to be a devastating phase for them.
[TURKEY -> AUSTRIA]: Austria, I am trusting your word that you will hold BUL and not attack CON this phase. I am focusing entirely on defending against a potential Russian stab. Please look at Russia's 6 centers—they are the real threat to your dominance in the Balkans.
[AUSTRIA -> ITALY]: Confirmed! My orders are locked as well: A BUL Hold, supported by F AEG and F GRE. Enjoy the build, and let's coordinate our next moves in the Winter phase.
[AUSTRIA -> RUSSIA]: Thank you for the crucial intel! I will absolutely make sure A BUL is heavily supported by both F AEG and F GRE to bounce their attack. Your moves into BLA and ANK will be the final nail in their coffin. Best of luck, and let's celebrate our builds!
[AUSTRIA -> TURKEY]: You have my word, I am only ordering A BUL to hold with support to ensure it isn't dislodged. I will not be moving into CON. I highly recommend you use your units to defend against Russia's incoming attacks on the Black Sea and Ankara. We can discuss containing Russia during the Winter phase.
[RUSSIA -> AUSTRIA]: Austria, Turkey just confirmed again they are ordering A CON - BUL supported by F BLA. Make sure your support for BUL is rock solid. I am moving on ANK and BLA now. This is the end for them!
[TURKEY -> AUSTRIA]: Austria, I am trusting your word. I will focus my units on defending against Russia (protecting BLA and ANK). Let's talk in the Winter about how to contain the Russian threat.

== TASK ==
Each round in this game, every player submits movement orders simultaneously.

You know that ITALY has also had private conversations with other players that you cannot see.

Based on everything available to you as AUSTRIA, predict ITALY's likely submitted orders for this phase.

ITALY's units and legal orders are listed below for reference:
ITALY's orderable units and legal moves:
  Unit at EAS:
    - F EAS S F AEG - SMY
    - F EAS - ION
    - F EAS - SMY
    - F EAS C A SMY - SYR
    - F EAS S F GRE - AEG
    - F EAS S A SMY
    - F EAS C A CON - SYR
    - F EAS S A ARM - SMY
    - F EAS - AEG
    - F EAS S F GRE - ION
    - F EAS S F TYS - ION
    - F EAS S F AEG
    - F EAS - SYR
    - F EAS S A SMY - SYR
    - F EAS H
    - F EAS S F AEG - ION
    - F EAS C A BUL - SYR
    - F EAS S A CON - SMY
    - F EAS S A ARM - SYR
    - F EAS S A BUL - SMY
  Unit at SMY:
    - A SMY - SYR VIA
    - A SMY S A BUL - ANK
    - A SMY S A BUL - CON
    - A SMY S A SEV - ANK
    - A SMY S A SEV - CON
    - A SMY H
    - A SMY S A ARM - CON
    - A SMY - CON VIA
    - A SMY S A SEV - ARM
    - A SMY - GRE VIA
    - A SMY S A CON - SYR
    - A SMY S A BUL - SYR
    - A SMY S F BLA - ANK
    - A SMY S F BLA - CON
    - A SMY S A ARM
    - A SMY - ANK
    - A SMY - ARM
    - A SMY S A ARM - ANK
    - A SMY S A BUL - ARM
    - A SMY - BUL VIA
    - A SMY - CON
    - A SMY S A CON - ARM
    - A SMY S F EAS - SYR
    - A SMY S F AEG - CON
    - A SMY S A ARM - SYR
    - A SMY S A CON - ANK
    - A SMY - SYR
    - A SMY S A CON
    - A SMY S F BLA - ARM
  Unit at TYS:
    - F TYS - TUN
    - F TYS - ION
    - F TYS S F GRE - ION
    - F TYS S F EAS - ION
    - F TYS H
    - F TYS - LYO
    - F TYS S A VEN - ROM
    - F TYS S F MAO - WES
    - F TYS S A VEN - TUS
    - F TYS - NAP
    - F TYS - ROM
    - F TYS - TUS
    - F TYS S F AEG - ION
    - F TYS - WES
  Unit at VEN:
    - A VEN H
    - A VEN S F TYS - TUS
    - A VEN - PIE
    - A VEN - TRI
    - A VEN S A MUN - TYR
    - A VEN S A VIE - TYR
    - A VEN S F TYS - ROM
    - A VEN - ROM
    - A VEN - APU
    - A VEN - TUS
    - A VEN S A MAR - PIE
    - A VEN S A BUD - TRI
    - A VEN - TYR
    - A VEN S A VIE - TRI

Respond in JSON format:
{
  "reasoning": "Your chain-of-thought analysis of what ITALY is likely to do, based on the board state, negotiations, and strategic position.",
  "predicted_orders": ["order1", "order2", "..."]
}

target_diary_entries_this_phase:
[F1903M] Austria is holding BUL with support from AEG and GRE. Russia is attacking ANK with ARM and BLA with RUM. Turkey leaked to Russia that they are ordering CON-BUL supported by BLA. I agreed with Austria and Russia to hold SMY supported by EAS to guarantee the build. In the West, I have successfully deceived France into believing I will order TYS-TUN and VEN Hold, keeping their southern flank empty. Meanwhile, I have coordinated with England and Germany to launch a surprise attack on France: I will order TYS-LYO and VEN-PIE while Germany attacks BUR.
Intent: Order A SMY Hold supported by F EAS to secure the center for a build. Order F TYS - LYO and A VEN - PIE to launch a surprise attack on France's exposed southern flank, fulfilling my agreements with England and Germany while betraying France.

[F1903M] The Fall 1903 phase was a spectacular success. My surprise attack on France executed flawlessly; F TYS moved to LYO and A VEN to PIE without resistance. France was entirely distracted by their wars with Germany and England, even ordering A MAR to support BUR. Their southern flank is now completely exposed, and I am perfectly positioned to strike Marseilles or Spain next year. 

In the East, the Austro-Russian-Italian alliance held firm. I secured Smyrna, while Russia successfully captured Ankara. Turkey is now reduced to a single center (Constantinople) and faces imminent elimination. 

With 5 supply centers, I have earned a crucial build. I will likely build a fleet in Naples to accelerate my western naval campaign against France, though I must remain vigilant of Austria's growing power (now at 6 SCs). My immediate goals for 1904 are to capture French centers, finish Turkey, and maintain my alliances.
target_full_diary:
[S1901M] Agreed to a Lepanto alliance with Austria, including a mutual DMZ in Tyrolia, Venice, Trieste, and the Adriatic Sea. Austria is moving F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER, and A VIE - BUD. Established DMZs with France (Piedmont, Gulf of Lyon, Tyrrhenian Sea) and Germany (Tyrolia). Maintained friendly relations with England and Russia for potential future coordination. Deceived Turkey by agreeing to a demilitarized Eastern Med while actually preparing the Lepanto.
Intent: Execute the standard Lepanto opening as agreed with Austria: F NAP - ION, A ROM - APU, and A VEN Hold. This respects the DMZs with Austria, France, and Germany while setting up for a Fall convoy to Tunis and future action against Turkey.

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went exactly as planned. The Lepanto alliance with Austria is in full effect; Austria executed their agreed moves (F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER) and respected our DMZs in Venice, Trieste, the Adriatic, and Tyrolia. France and Germany also honored our DMZ agreements, leaving my borders completely secure. 

Turkey executed a standard opening (F ANK - BLA, A CON - BUL), while Russia moved F SEV - RUM, avoiding a bounce in the Black Sea. This suggests a possible non-aggression pact between Russia and Turkey, making our Lepanto even more crucial to contain them.

My strategic position is excellent. I am perfectly positioned to convoy A APU to Tunis via F ION in the Fall. Austria has proven trustworthy, solidifying our alliance. My next steps are to secure Tunis, build F NAP in the Winter, and prepare to move F ION to the Eastern Mediterranean in 1902 to pressure Turkey.

[F1901M] Solidified the Lepanto alliance with Austria, who will take GRE while I convoy to TUN. Secured an anti-Turkish alliance with Russia, who is furious about Turkey taking the Black Sea; we will coordinate attacks in 1902. Maintained strong DMZ agreements with France (Piedmont, GoL, TYS) and Germany (Tyrolia). Successfully deceived Turkey into believing the Eastern Med DMZ is secure and our relations are peaceful.
Intent: Execute the agreed Fall Lepanto moves: F ION C A APU - TUN, A APU - TUN, and A VEN Hold. This secures Tunis, respects all DMZs with France, Germany, and Austria, and perfectly sets up a Winter build of F NAP for the 1902 offensive against Turkey.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase unfolded flawlessly. The Lepanto alliance with Austria remains rock solid; they successfully took Greece while I convoyed my army to Tunis. Crucially, the anticipated conflict between Russia and Turkey erupted in the east. Turkey attempted to force Romania with Black Sea support, but Russia successfully defended it with a strong three-unit wall. This Turkish aggression cements Russia as a vital ally and ensures Turkey is distracted on multiple fronts. 

My borders with France and Germany remain secure, as both respected our DMZs while focusing on the west (France even supported England into Belgium). 

My strategic position is exceptional. I have secured my fourth center (Tunis) and will build F NAP this Winter. In 1902, I will move F ION to the Eastern Mediterranean and F NAP to ION, springing the Lepanto trap on a Turkey that is already bogged down fighting Russia.

[S1902M] Solidified the Lepanto alliance with Austria and Russia to crush Turkey. Austria is moving F TRI-ALB, F GRE-AEG, and A SER-BUL. Russia is attacking the Black Sea and Armenia. Successfully deceived Turkey into believing I am moving F NAP-TYS and holding F ION to counter France, prompting Turkey to move F SMY-CON and leave the East Med clear. Maintained DMZs with France (Piedmont, GoL, TYS) and Germany (Tyrolia). England and Germany warned that France is moving F BRE-MAO, so I must monitor my western flank.
Intent: Execute the Spring 1902 Lepanto moves: F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Hold A VEN to respect DMZs with Austria, Germany, and France. Hold A TUN. This springs the trap on Turkey while they are distracted by Austria and Russia.

[S1902M] The Lepanto trap has been perfectly executed! My fleets successfully moved to the Eastern Mediterranean and the Ionian Sea, while Austria positioned fleets in the Aegean and Albania. Turkey was completely caught off guard, wasting their moves attempting to force Romania while jamming their own units (F SMY and A CON bounced). Russia held strong in Romania, cementing our three-way anti-Turkish alliance. 

Austria continues to prove themselves as a highly trustworthy and competent ally. Our coordination is flawless. In the west, France moved F POR to MAO, which warrants monitoring, but they are heavily engaged with Germany (who took Burgundy) and England, keeping my western flank relatively safe. 

For Fall 1902, my primary objective is to coordinate with Austria to convoy A TUN to Syria or directly assault Smyrna. I must maintain my secure borders in Venice and Piedmont while delivering a crippling blow to Turkey.

[F1902M] Austria and Russia are fully coordinated to attack Turkey; Austria will order A SER - BUL supported by F AEG and Russia's F RUM, while Austria also moves F ALB - GRE. Russia confirmed Turkey plans to order A BUL - SER, walking into the trap. I have agreed with Austria and Russia to convoy A TUN to SYR. Germany successfully invaded Burgundy and encouraged me to attack France, but I declined for now to focus east, though Germany warned me to watch Austria's rapid growth. France requested a distraction against Germany, but I confirmed I will maintain our southern DMZs. Turkey pleaded for me to stop, warning of an Austrian juggernaut; I feigned that I would just 'hold' in EAS to see how things develop.
Intent: Execute the Lepanto convoy: A TUN - SYR, F ION C A TUN - SYR, F EAS C A TUN - SYR. Hold A VEN to maintain DMZs with Austria, Germany, and France.

[F1902M] The Lepanto convoy was a complete success! My army has landed in Syria, perfectly outflanking Turkey's defenses. Austria and Russia coordinated flawlessly to attack Bulgaria, but Turkey's entrenched defense (supported by the Black Sea and Constantinople) held strong, resulting in a bounce. 

While Turkey survived this year without losing a center, their position is now crumbling from behind. Austria successfully took Greece and will build, which I must monitor closely to ensure I don't fall behind in our alliance. I need to secure Smyrna or another Turkish center for myself in 1903 to keep pace with Austrian growth.

In the west, France took London, and their war with Germany continues, keeping my western flank completely secure. My immediate goal for 1903 is to leverage my Syrian army to crack Turkey's defenses, likely targeting Smyrna, while maintaining my strong alliance with Austria and Russia.

[S1903M] Coordinated a massive strike against Turkey with Austria and Russia. Austria will attack BUL with 4 units (A SER supported by F AEG, F GRE, and Russian F RUM), while Russia also moves A SEV - ARM. I will attack SMY with A SYR supported by F EAS. I have successfully deceived Turkey into believing I am holding A SYR and F EAS while moving F ION west, prompting them to promise to hold F SMY and A CON. Meanwhile, Germany and England have strongly encouraged me to attack France's exposed southern flank. I have agreed with Germany to move F ION - TYS to begin this western pivot, while falsely assuring France that our DMZs remain intact.
Intent: Order A SYR - SMY supported by F EAS to secure a Turkish center. Order F ION - TYS to begin the naval shift against France. Order A VEN to Hold to maintain northern DMZs.

[S1903M] The Spring 1903 phase was a resounding success. The coordinated Austro-Russian-Italian strike completely shattered Turkish defenses. I successfully captured Smyrna with my Syrian army, while Austria took Bulgaria with Russian support. Turkey is now crippled and effectively eliminated as a threat. 

Simultaneously, my western pivot has begun flawlessly. F ION moved to the Tyrrhenian Sea without raising alarms. France is heavily distracted: they just lost London back to England and are locked in a fierce struggle with Germany over Burgundy. Their southern flank remains completely exposed to my impending naval assault.

While the Lepanto alliance has yielded great spoils, Austria's rapid growth (now holding Greece, Serbia, and Bulgaria) remains a long-term concern. My immediate goals for the Fall are to secure Smyrna, finalize the destruction of Turkey, and launch a surprise attack on France's Mediterranean centers while they are bogged down in the north.

[F1903M] Austria is holding BUL with support from AEG and GRE. Russia is attacking ANK with ARM and BLA with RUM. Turkey leaked to Russia that they are ordering CON-BUL supported by BLA. I agreed with Austria and Russia to hold SMY supported by EAS to guarantee the build. In the West, I have successfully deceived France into believing I will order TYS-TUN and VEN Hold, keeping their southern flank empty. Meanwhile, I have coordinated with England and Germany to launch a surprise attack on France: I will order TYS-LYO and VEN-PIE while Germany attacks BUR.
Intent: Order A SMY Hold supported by F EAS to secure the center for a build. Order F TYS - LYO and A VEN - PIE to launch a surprise attack on France's exposed southern flank, fulfilling my agreements with England and Germany while betraying France.

[F1903M] The Fall 1903 phase was a spectacular success. My surprise attack on France executed flawlessly; F TYS moved to LYO and A VEN to PIE without resistance. France was entirely distracted by their wars with Germany and England, even ordering A MAR to support BUR. Their southern flank is now completely exposed, and I am perfectly positioned to strike Marseilles or Spain next year. 

In the East, the Austro-Russian-Italian alliance held firm. I secured Smyrna, while Russia successfully captured Ankara. Turkey is now reduced to a single center (Constantinople) and faces imminent elimination. 

With 5 supply centers, I have earned a crucial build. I will likely build a fleet in Naples to accelerate my western naval campaign against France, though I must remain vigilant of Austria's growing power (now at 6 SCs). My immediate goals for 1904 are to capture French centers, finish Turkey, and maintain my alliances.
target_goals_post_phase: Secure Smyrna with A SMY and F EAS to guarantee a build
Launch a surprise attack on France's southern flank (LYO and PIE)
Maintain the anti-Turkish alliance with Austria and Russia to finish Turkey in 1904
Coordinate with England and Germany to dismantle France
Vigilantly monitor Austrian builds and movements to prevent a backstab
